name: Lemony Salmon Patties
recipeIngredient: 14 3/4 ounces pink salmon, drained, skin & bones removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 9 ingredients; mix well.
2. Spoon into 8 greased muffin cups, using 1/4 cup in each.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes or until browned.
4. Meanwhile, melt butter in a saucepan; stir in flour to form a smooth paste.
5. Gradually stir in milk; bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
6. Cook for 2 minutes or until thickened.
7. Remove from the heat; stir in lemon juice, salt, and cayenne.
8. Serve over patties.
